subject: [HOLMES] Remove DCAE-CBS Dependencies
commit_message:
[HOLMES] Remove DCAE-CBS Dependencies

Completed the final phase of the Helm transformation of DCAE services.

Issue-ID: HOLMES-488
Signed-off-by: Guangrong Fu <fu.guangrong@zte.com.cn>
